info.title: Yuno Payments API
info.description: Yuno payment orchestration API for processing payments across Latin America

post.description: Creates a new checkout session to initialize a payment flow. Returns HTTP 200 (not 201).

error.message: amount.currency is required and must be a valid ISO 4217 code

get.description: Retrieves the details of an existing checkout session.

parameters.name: checkout_session_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the checkout session

patch.description: Updates an existing checkout session. You can modify the amount, metadata, or other mutable fields before the session expires or a payment is completed.

parameters.name: checkout_session_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the checkout session to update

metadata.description: Key-value pairs for storing additional information

409.description: Checkout session cannot be updated (already completed or expired)

parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Unique identifier used in HTTP headers to ensure that a request is processed only once, even if it is retried due to network issues or timeouts.

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the account. You find this information on [the Yuno dashboard](https://dashboard.y.uno/) (UUID, 36 chars).

merchant_order_id.description: The unique identifier of the customer's order (MAX 255; MIN 3).

description.description: The description of the payment (MAX 255; MIN 3).

amount.description: Specifies the payment amount object, with the value and currency.

currency.description: The currency used to make the payment. For a full list of currency codes, see [Country reference](doc:country-reference) (MAX 3; MIN 3; ISO 4217).

id.description: The unique identifier of the [conversion rate query](doc:currency-conversion) from Yuno. (UUID, 36 chars)

provider_currency_conversion_id.description: The unique identifier of the conversion rate query from the provider (MAX 526 ; MIN 3)

cardholder_currency.description: The currency to make the conversion (ISO 4217 MAX 3; MIN 3). This field is required if the 'currency_conversion' object is included in the request.

cardholder_amount.description: Amount of the payment before conversion (multiple of 0.0001). This field is required if the 'currency_conversion' object is included in the request.

checkout.description: Specifies the checkout object. This object is not mandatory for back to back payments. Required when `workflow` is defined as `SDK_CHECKOUT` or is not sent. not required for `DIRECT` or `REDIRECT` payments.

session.description: The checkout session that has been created for the payment using the [Create Checkout Session](https://docs.y.uno/reference/create-checkout-session) endpoint (UUID, 36 chars). This field is required if the `checkout` object is included in the request.

additional_data.description: Specifies the additional_data object. This object is not mandatory. However, if you send this information, the payment experience will be enhanced for your user.

shipping_amount.description: The shipping amount of the order (multiple of 0.0001). This field is for informational purposes, the shipping amount is already included in the final transaction amount and is not added separately.

fee_amount.description: The fee amount of the order (multiple of 0.0001). This field is for informational purposes, the fee amount is already included in the final transaction amount and is not added separately.

tip_amount.description: The tip amount of the order (multiple of 0.0001). This field is for informational purposes, the tip amount is already included in the final transaction amount and is not added separately.

taxes.description: The taxes of the order. This struct is for informational purposes, the taxes amount is already included in the final transaction amount and is not added separately.

tax_base.description: The amount base to apply the tax defined.

items.description: Specifies the items array of object.

id.description: The unique identifier of the item (MAX 255; MIN 3).

name.description: The name of the item (MAX 255; MIN 3).

unit_amount.description: The unit amount of the item (multiple of 0.0001).

category.description: The category of the item. Check the [Item category reference](items-category-list).

brand.description: The brand of the item (MAX 255; MIN 3).

sku_code.description: The stock keeping unit (SKU) of the item (MAX 255; MIN 3).

manufacture_part_number.description: The manufacture part number of the item.

url.description: The item's URL available to the buyer (MAX 512; MIN 3).

deliver_at.description: Estimated date of delivery (ISO 8601 MAX 27; MIN 27)

currency.description: The currency used to make the payment (ISO 4217 MAX 3; MIN 3)

id.description: Id of the event related to the ticket

address_line_1.description: The primary billing address line (MAX 255; MIN 3)

address_line_2.description: The secondary billing address line (MAX 255; MIN 3)

building_number_1.description: The primary building number of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3)

building_number_2.description: The secondary building number of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3)

city.description: The city considered for the address (MAX 255; MIN 3)

country.description: The country consider for the address (ISO 3166-1 MAX 2; MIN 2)

state.description: The state / province considered for the  address (MAX 255; MIN 3)

zip_code.description: The zipcode considered for the  address (MAX 11; MIN 4)

account_funding.description: The account funding transaction details object necessary for [AFTs](doc:account-funding-transactions-afts).

sender.description: The sender object necessary for account funding transactions

legal_name.description: Sender's name. (Max: 80) Only necessary when national entity is ENTITY

date_of_birth.description: The beneficiary's date of birth in the YYYY-MM-DD (MAX 10; MIN 10)

document_number.description: Document number for customer (MAX 40; MIN 3). This field is required if the 'document' object is included in the request.

document_type.description: The customer's document type (MAX 6, MIN 2; [Country reference](ref:country-reference)).

country_code.description: The country calling code of the customer's phone (MAX 3; MIN 1). Check the [Country reference](country-reference) to see the phone codes. This field is required if the 'phone' object is included in the request.

number.description: The customer's phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1). This field is required if the 'phone' object is included in the request.

address_line_1.description: The primary billing address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 1). This field is required if the 'billing_address' object is included in the request.

address_line_2.description: The secondary billing address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 1).

building_number_1.description: The primary building number of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3)

building_number_2.description: The secondary building number of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3)

city.description: The city considered for the billing address (MAX 255; MIN 1). This field is required if the 'billing_address' object is included in the request.

country.description: The country considered for the billing address (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](country-reference)). This field is required if the 'billing_address' object is included in the request.

state.description: State or province code. Use ISO 3166-2 subdivision codes (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2).

zip_code.description: The zipcode considered for the billing address (MAX 11; MIN 3).

neighborhood.description: The neighborhood of the address line of the customer(MAX 255; MIN 1)

beneficiary.description: The beneficiary object necessary for account funding transactions.

legal_name.description: Beneficiary's name. (Max: 80) Only necessary when national entity is ENTITY

date_of_birth.description: The beneficiary's date of birth in the YYYY-MM-DD (MAX 10; MIN 10)

document_number.description: Document number for customer (MAX 40; MIN 3). This field is required if the 'document' object is included in the request.

document_type.description: The customer's document type (MAX 6, MIN 2; [Country reference](ref:country-reference)).

country_code.description: The country calling code of the customer's phone (MAX 3; MIN 1). Check the [Country reference](country-reference) to see the phone codes. This field is required if the 'phone' object is included in the request.

number.description: The customer's phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1). This field is required if the 'phone' object is included in the request.

address_line_1.description: The primary billing address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 1). This field is required if the 'billing_address' object is included in the request.

address_line_2.description: The secondary billing address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 1).

building_number_1.description: The primary building number of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3)

building_number_2.description: The secondary building number of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3)

city.description: The city considered for the billing address (MAX 255; MIN 1). This field is required if the 'billing_address' object is included in the request.

country.description: The country considered for the billing address (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](country-reference)). This field is required if the 'billing_address' object is included in the request.

state.description: State or province code. Use ISO 3166-2 subdivision codes (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2).

zip_code.description: The zipcode considered for the billing address (MAX 11; MIN 3).

neighborhood.description: The neighborhood of the address line of the customer(MAX 255; MIN 1)

discounts.description: Specifies the discounts array of object.

unit_amount.description: The unit amount of the discount (multiple of 0.0001).

sales_channel.description: Sales channel id of the payment. (MIN:3 y MAX:255)

departure_datetime.description: The departure date and time in UTC time ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601), MAX 27; MIN 27).

departure_airport_country.description: Country of the departure airport (MAX 2; MIN 2; ISO 3166-1).

departure_airport_city.description: The city considered for the departure airport (MAX 255; MIN 3).

arrival_airport.description: IATA airport code. See http://www.iata.org (MAX 3; MIN 3).

arrival_airport_country.description: Country of the arrival airport (MAX 2; MIN 2; ISO 3166-1).

arrival_airport_city.description: The city considered for the arrival airport (MAX 255; MIN 3).

arrival_datetime.description: The arrival date and time in UTC time ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601), MAX 27; MIN 27).

carrier_code.description: IATA carrier code. See http://www.iata.org (MAX 2; MIN 2).

flight_number.description: The flight number assigned by the airline carrier (MAX 5; MIN 1).

fare_basis_code.description: Code base rate provides specific information on the fare in addition to the class service, both required for booking (MAX 15; MIN 1).

fare_class_code.description: The fare class code of the airline (MAX 1; MIN 1). The values can be a letter (A-Z) but may vary depending on the airline's definition. Check the [Airline information reference](airline-information#fare-class-code).

base_fare.description: The transaction amount, excluding taxes and fees, the smallest unit of currency (multipleOf 0.0001).

base_fare_currency.description: The currency used to transaction amount (MAX 3; MIN 3).

stopover_code.description: 1-letter code indicating whether the passenger is allowed to make a stopover. Only two types of characters are allowed: O: Stopover allowed (the letter 'O', not zero) / X: Stopover not allowed. (MAX 1; MIN 1).

order.description: A running index (starts with 1), describing the order of legs in the same route.

route_order.description: A running index (starts with 1), describing the order of routes by time. E.g: If an order contains 2 Routes: New-York->London->Paris (connection in London) New-York->London should have route_order=1, order=1; London->Paris should have route_order=1, order=2; Paris->London->New-York: Paris->London should have route_order=2, order=1; London->New-York should have route_order=2, order=2.

passengers.description: Specifies the passengers array of objects.

type.description: The passenger type (MAX 1; MIN 1). Check the [Airline information reference](airline-information#passenger-type).

date_of_birth.description: The passenger date of birth in the YYYY-MM-DD (MAX 10; MIN 10).

document.description: Specifies the document object of the passenger.

document_type.description: The passenger's document type (MAX 6, MIN 2; [Country reference](ref:country-reference)).

loyalty_tier.description: Tier of passenger loyalty program. Check the [Airline information reference](airline-information#loyalty-tier).

phone.description: Specifies the phone object for the passenger.

country_code.description: The country calling code of the passenger's phone (MAX 3; MIN 1). Possible values: Check the [Country reference](ref:country-reference).

number.description: The passenger's phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1).

tickets.description: Specifies the array of ticket objects.

restricted.description: Indicates if the ticket is refunfable or not.

total_fare_amount.description: Total fare amount in the smallest unit of currency (multiple of 0.0001).

total_tax_amount.description: Total taxes amount in the smallest unit of currency (multiple of 0.0001).

total_fee_amount.description: Total fee amount in the smallest unit of currency (multiple of 0.0001).

carrier_prefix_code.description: Issuing or Validating carrier. This is the AWB Prefix (Air waybill) 3-numeric code (MAX 3; MIN 3).

travel_agent_code.description: Code of the travel agent issuing the ticket (MAX 9; MIN 8).

travel_agent_name.description: The name under which the point of sale appears on the agency list or franchise name (MAX 32; MIN 1).

booking_system_code.description: Code of the booking system issuing the ticket. (MAX 255; MIN 1).

booking_system_name.description: Name of the booking system issuing the ticket. (MAX 255; MIN 1).

address.description: Address of the agent whose sold the ticket (MAX 255; MIN 3).

city.description: City name of the agent whose sold the ticket (MAX 255; MIN 3).

country.description: Country code alpha 2 where the ticket was issued (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](country-reference)).

transportations.description: Specifies the transportations array of objects.

id.description: The id of the transportation booking (MAX 255; MIN 1).

description.description: The description of the transportation booking (MAX 255; MIN 1).

legs.description: Specifies the legs array of objects.

order.description: A running index (starts with 1), describing the order of legs in the same route.

route_order.description: A running index (starts with 1), describing the order of routes by time.

departure_country.description: Country of the departure (MAX 2; MIN 2; ISO 3166-1).

departure_city.description: The city of the departure (MAX 255; MIN 1).

departure_datetime.description: The departure date and time in local time at the departure.

departure_reference.description: The reference of the departure (MAX 255; MIN 1).

arrival_country.description: Country of the arrival (MAX 2; MIN 2; ISO 3166-1).

arrival_city.description: The city of the arrival (MAX 255; MIN 1).

arrival_datetime.description: The arrival date and time in local time at the arrival.

arrival_reference.description: The reference of the arrival (MAX 255; MIN 1).

id.description: The id of the transportation vehicle (MAX 255; MIN 1).
The id of the transportation vehicle (MAX 255; MIN 1).

description.description: The description of the transportation vehicle (MAX 255; MIN 1).

passengers.description: Specifies the passengers array of objects.

type.description: The passenger type (MAX 1; MIN 1). Check the Airline information reference.

date_of_birth.description: The passenger date of birth in the YYYY-MM-DD (MAX 10; MIN 10).

document.description: Specifies the document object of the passenger.

document_type.description: The passenger's document type (MAX 6, MIN 2; [Document Type List](https://docs.y.uno/reference/country-reference)).

loyalty_tier.description: Tier of passenger loyalty program. Check the Airline information reference.

phone.description: Specifies the phone object for the passenger.

country_code.description: The country calling code of the passenger's phone (MAX 3; MIN 1).

number.description: The passenger's phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1).

tickets.description: Specifies the array of ticket objects.

restricted.description: Indicates if the ticket is refundable or not.

total_fare_amount.description: Total fare amount in the smallest unit of currency (multiple of 0.0001).

total_tax_amount.description: Total taxes amount in the smallest unit of currency (multiple of 0.0001).

total_fee_amount.description: Total fee amount in the smallest unit of currency (multiple of 0.0001).

industry.description: The seller's industry (MAX 235; MIN 1) For more information access the [Industry category reference page](industry-category-list).

merchant_category_code.description: MCC - The merchant category code (MAX 235; MIN 1).

document.description: Specifies the document object of the seller.

document_type.description: The seller's document type (MAX 6, MIN 2; [Document Type List](https://docs.y.uno/reference/country-reference)).

phone.description: Specifies the seller's phone number object.

country_code.description: The country calling code of the seller's phone (MAX 3; MIN 1). Check the [Country reference](country-reference) to see the phone codes.

number.description: The seller's phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1).

address_line_1.description: The primary address line of the seller (MAX 255; MIN 3).

address_line_2.description: The secondary billing address line of the seller (MAX 255; MIN 3).

building_number_1.description: The primary building number of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3)

building_number_2.description: The secondary building number of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3)

city.description: The city considered for the seller's address (MAX 255; MIN 3).

country.description: The country considered for the seller's address (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](ref:country-reference)).

state.description: The state considered for the seller's address (MAX 255; MIN 1).

zip_code.description: The zipcode considered for the seller's address (MAX 11; MIN 4).

country.description: Country where the transaction must be processed (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](ref:country-reference)).

merchant_reference.description: Identification of the payment transaction defined by the merchant (MAX 255; MIN 3). Optional to complement the merchant_order_id.

id.description:
The unique identifier of the customer (UUID, 36 chars). This `id` is returned in Yuno's [Create Customer](ref:create-customer) endpoint. This object is not mandatory for DIRECT payments. If the `id` of a customer is sent, it is not necessary to complete the rest of the `customer_payer` object, the information of the previously created customer will be taken into account for the payment.
Example: `be8a1640-43d2-4a75-9694-c6468d82cba3`.

merchant_customer_id.description: The unique identifier for a customer in the merchant's system, assigned by the merchant (MAX 255; MIN 1).

merchant_customer_created_at.description: Customer´s registration date on the merchants platform (ISO 8601 MAX 27; MIN 27)

merchant_customer_validations.description: Fraud validations for the customer payer

account_is_verified.description: If the customer's account has been validated before on the merchant's side. True by default

email_is_verified.description: If the customer's email has been validated before on the merchant's side. True by default

phone_is_verified.description: If the customer's phone has been validated before on the merchant's side. True by default

gender.description: The customer's gender (MAX 2; MIN 1; (M=Male/F=Female/NB=Non Binary/NA=Not applicable/NK=Not Known/U=Undefined)).

date_of_birth.description: The customer's date of birth in the YYYY-MM-DD format (Length: 10).

device_fingerprints.description: The customer's [device fingerprints](doc:direct-flow#important-add-ons) (MAX 4000; MIN 1). In case you are using a DIRECT integration and want to support fraud providers in the payment flow, you can use this object to specify the necessary information. For integrations using Yuno checkout the value is obtained automatically, do not send this field.

id.description: The device fingerprint associated to the provider

user_agent.description: The user agent value of the customer's browser (MAX 255; MIN 3).

accept_header.description: The accept header value of the customer's browser.

platform.description: The platform from which the customer is making the payment.

color_depth.description: The color depth of the customer's browser in bits per pixel. This should be obtained by using the browser's screen.colorDepth property. Accepted values: 1, 4, 8, 15, 16, 24, 30, 32 or 48 bit color depth. (MAX 5; MIN 1).

screen_height.description: The total height of the customer's device screen in pixels. (MAX 255; MIN 3).

screen_width.description: The total width of the customer's device screen in pixels. (MAX 255; MIN 3).

javascript_enabled.description: Indicates if Javascript is enabled or not in the device.

language.description: The navigator.language value of the customer's browser (as defined in IETF BCP 47) (MAX 5; MIN 1).

accept_browser.description: The accept browser value of the customer's browser

accept_content.description: The accept content value of the customer's browser

java_enabled.description: Indicates if Java is enabled or not in the device

document.description: Specifies the customer's document object, including its number and type.

document_number.description: Document number for customer (MAX 40; MIN 3). This field is required if the 'document' object is included in the request.

document_type.description: The customer's document type (MAX 6, MIN 2; [Country reference](ref:country-reference)).

billing_address.description: Specifies the customer's billing address object.

address_line_1.description: The primary billing address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3). This field is required if the 'billing_address' object is included in the request.

address_line_2.description: The secondary billing address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

building_number_1.description: The primary building number of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

building_number_2.description: The secondary building number of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

city.description: The city considered for the billing address (MAX 255; MIN 3). This field is required if the 'billing_address' object is included in the request.

country.description: The country considered for the billing address (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](country-reference)). This field is required if the 'billing_address' object is included in the request.

state.description: State or province code. Use ISO 3166-2 subdivision codes (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2).

zip_code.description: The zip code considered for the billing address (MAX 10; MIN 5).

neighborhood.description: The neighborhood of the address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 2)

shipping_address.description: Specifies the customer's shipping address object.

address_line_1.description: The primary shipping address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3). This field is required if the 'shipping_address' object is included in the request.

address_line_2.description: The secondary shipping address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

building_number_1.description: The primary building number of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

building_number_2.description: The secondary building number of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 3).

city.description: The city considered for the shipping address (MAX 255; MIN 3). This field is required if the 'shipping_address' object is included in the request.

country.description: The country considered for the shipping address (MAX 2; MIN 2; [ISO 3166-1](country-reference)). **[Required]**.

state.description: State or province code. Use ISO 3166-2 subdivision codes (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2).

zip_code.description: The zip code considered for the shipping address (MAX 10; MIN 5).

neighborhood.description: The neighborhood of the address line of the customer (MAX 255; MIN 2)

phone.description: Specifies the customer's phone number object.

country_code.description: The country calling code of the customer's phone (MAX 3; MIN 1). Check the [Country reference](country-reference) to see the phone codes. This field is required if the 'phone' object is included in the request.

number.description: The customer's phone number, without the country code (MAX 32; MIN 1). This field is required if the 'phone' object is included in the request.

latitude.description: Angular distance of a location on the earth south or north of the equator (MIN: 1, MAX:11)

longitude.description: Angular measurement of the distance of a location on the earth east or west of the Greenwich observatory. (MIN: 1, MAX:11)

workflow.description:
The payment workflow. Indicates whether the integration will use Yuno´s SDK or will be a back to back connection. [Guides](doc:quickstart)
  • `SDK_CHECKOUT`: [Recommended] - Use Yuno's SDK.
  • `DIRECT`: Back to back integration with provider info for custom payment experience.
  • `REDIRECT`: Back to back integration with provider redirection.

token.description: The one time use payment method token **provided by Yuno sdk**. If a payment is created using a token, it is not necessary to send a vaulted_token as well, it can be defined as null. Not necessary for back to back payments (MAX: 64; MIN: 36).

vaulted_token.description: The vaulted token for a **previously stored payment_method**. If a payment is created using a vaulted_token, it is not necessary to send a token as well, it can be defined as null (MAX: 64; MIN: 36).

type.description: Type of the payment method. Only required for `DIRECT` or `REDIRECT` workflow. Required when integrating wallets, even when using the SDK.

detail.description: Specifies the payment method detail object.

capture.description: Determines whether the card payment is captured immediately (`TRUE` = purchase) or only authorized (`FALSE` = requires capture or cancel).

delayed_capture_settings.description: Configuration for automatically capturing the full authorized amount after a delay. Only valid when capture = `FALSE`.

delay.description: Delay before Yuno performs the capture (ISO 8601 format).

simplified_mode.description: If true, Yuno retries the capture if it fails.

delayed_cancel_settings.description: Configuration for automatically canceling the authorization after a delay. Only valid when capture = `FALSE`.

delay.description: Delay before Yuno performs the cancel (ISO 8601 format).

simplified_mode.description: If true, Yuno retries the capture if it fails.

first_installment_deferral.description: Number of months to be waited to debit the first installment.

soft_descriptor.description: The descriptor passed per transaction. It will be presented on the customer's bank statement (MAX 255).

number.description: Card's number without any separators. (MAX 19; MIN 8) - only available for PCI certified merchants.

expiration_month.description: Card's expiration month - MM (MAX 2; MIN 2) - only available for PCI certified merchants.

expiration_year.description: Card's expiration year - YYYY (MAX 4; MIN 2) - only available for PCI certified merchants.

security_code.description: Card's security code (MAX 4; MIN 3) - only available for PCI certified merchants.

holder_name.description: Cardholder's full name as it appears on the card (MAX 26; MIN 3) - only available for PCI certified merchants.

type.description: The card type. For dual cards (like in Brazil), you can specify the type of card that is being processed so we can inform the providers.

network_token.description: The network token object. Only available for merchants that handle the network token generation/management from their side. [Direct Network token guide](https://docs.y.uno/docs/network-tokens#2--use-your-existing-network-tokens)

number.description: [Mandatory] - Token's number without any separators. (MAX 19; MIN 8) - only available for PCI certified merchants

holder_name.description: Cardholder's full name as it appears on the Token (MAX 26; MIN 3)

expiration_year.description: Token's expiration year - YYYY (MAX 4; MIN 4) - only available for PCI certified merchants

cryptogram.description: [Mandatory] - The unique cryptogram generated by the issuer for the network token in use in the transaction.

electronic_commerce_indicator.description: [Only required for certain providers] - In case the token has been authenticated by Mastercard the field should be set to 02. For Visa or not authenticated tokens, is not necessary to send the field.

token_requestor_id.description: [Only required for certain providers] - Token requestor ID of the merchant

three_d_secure_setup_id.description: Three_d_secure_setup_id field is only required when using 3D Secure (3DS) authentication in Yuno with Direct Flow.

version.description: [Optional for 3DS integration without Yuno's JS] - Refers to the protocol version of the EMV 3-D Secure specification used. 1.0, 2.0, 2.1.0, 2.2.0, 2.2.1, 2.3.0 y 2.3.1

electronic_commerce_indicator.description: [Optional for 3DS integration without Yuno's JS] - This field must be completed with the result of the ECI field provided by the 3d Secure service. The Electronic Commerce Indicator (ECI) informs the card issuer if the transaction was protected by a security protocol like VbV or MCSC. It is mandated by Visa and MasterCard that all 3-D Secure transactions have this value populated in the authorization request. (Min: 0, max: 2).

cryptogram.description: [Optional for 3DS integration without Yuno's JS] - This field must be completed with the result of the cryptogram field provided by the 3DSecure service. In Visa transactions, it represents the Cardholder Authentication Verification Value (CAVV), a cryptographic value generated by the Issuer as evidence of payment authentication during online purchase to qualify for chargeback protection. MasterCard transactions have a similar value called Accountholder Authentication Value (AAV) or the Universal Cardholder Authentication Field (UCAF). When submitting a transaction for authorization, the merchant must include the CAVV or AAV/UCAF to demonstrate that the cardholder has been authenticated. It is typically base64-encoded. (Min: 0, Max: 40).

transaction_id.description: [Optional for 3DS integration without Yuno's JS] - For 3DS v1: This is the Unique Transaction Identifier. It is automatically generated by the MPI. It is typically 28 bytes in length and base64-encoded. Is commonly referred to as XID. (Min: 0, Max: 40). For 3DS v2: Universally unique transaction identifier assigned by the DS to identify a single transaction. (Min: 36, Max:36).

directory_server_transaction_id.description: [Optional for 3DS integration without Yuno's JS] - Transaction ID generated by the Mastercard directory server during authentication (MAX 255; MIN 3).

verify.description: Using  amount = 0 and verify = true, you can verify the user's card without authorizing a real amount. If the field is not sent, we will take it as false.

acquirer_reference_number.description: Unique identifier assigned by the card acquirer to track transactions through the network (MAX; 30).

stored_credentials.description: Indicates the processing type of the transaction. Refer to the Stored credentials documentation for more information.

reason.description: Indicates the processing type of the transaction.

usage.description: This field Iets you indicate if this is the first time the vaulted_token/network_token is used for a payment.

subscription_agreement_id.description: This field lets you indicate the identification of the agreement with the customer for a subscription. Mainly for MX.(MAX 255; MIN 3). [Stored credentials](doc:stored-credentials)

network_transaction_id.description: Unique identifier assigned to a transaction by the card network. It is used to track and reference specific transactions, particularly in recurring payment scenarios, ensuring consistency and traceability across the payment lifecycle. (MAX 255; MIN 3). [Stored credentials](doc:stored-credentials)

benefit_type.description: Specifies the user's benefit type for Pluxee Chile.

expires_at.description: Payment methods expiration date. "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSz". Only available when the provider associated to the payment supports it. Please feel free to reach out to your technical account manager for further questions.

payment_token.description: Complete wallet response payload as a JSON string, exactly as returned by the wallet provider

expires_at.description: Payment methods expiration date. "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSz". Only available when the provider associated to the payment supports it. Please feel free to reach out to your technical account manager for further questions.

capture.description: Indicates whether the wallet payment should be captured immediately (true) or only authorized for later capture (false)

soft_descriptor.description: The descriptor passed per transaction. It will be presented on the customer's bank statement (MAX 255).

domain_url.description: Registered domain used during the wallet flow. (MAX 255; MIN 3).

stored_credentials.description: Indicates the processing type of the transaction. Refer to the Stored credentials documentation for more information.

reason.description: Indicates the processing type of the transaction.

usage.description: This field Iets you indicate if this is the first time the vaulted_token/network_token is used for a payment.

subscription_agreement_id.description: This field lets you indicate the identification of the agreement with the customer for a subscription. Mainly for MX.(MAX 255; MIN 3). [Stored credentials](doc:stored-credentials)

network_transaction_id.description: Unique identifier assigned to a transaction by the card network. It is used to track and reference specific transactions, particularly in recurring payment scenarios, ensuring consistency and traceability across the payment lifecycle. (MAX 255; MIN 3). [Stored credentials](doc:stored-credentials)

additional_data.description: This structure is used to send additional information about recurrence. It's optional, and few providers require it (e.g. Mercado Pago). Contact your TAM to confirm if it's needed for your integration.

billing_cycles.description: Specifies the `billing_cycles` object. Defines the number of charges associated to the subscription. If using this object, you must enter data on all fields.

total.description: The total number of billing cycles for the subscription (MIN 1).

frequency.description: Specifies the frequency type (e.g., DAY, WEEK, MONTH, YEAR) and value. Enter data on all fields if using this object.

type.description: Specifies the frequency type (e.g., DAY, WEEK, MONTH, YEAR).

availability.description: Specifies the `availability` object. Defines a date interval based on starting and ending dates when the subscription is available to use.

start_at.description: The start date that the subscription plan will be available to use. If not set, the subscription is available from the moment it is created. `start_at` becomes mandatory when using `finish_at`.

finish_at.description: The end date until the subscription plan will be available to use. If not defined, the subscription does not have an expiration date. `finish_at` becomes mandatory when using `start_at`.

soft_descriptor.description: Human-readable reference associated with the bank transfer. Commonly used for reconciliation and operational purposes (MAX 255; MIN 1).

expires_at.description: Payment methods expiration date. "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSz". Only available when the provider associated to the payment supports it. Please feel free to reach out to your technical account manager for further questions.

account_type.description: Type of the bank account (MAX 255; MIN 3). CHECKINGS/SAVINGS

bank_account.description: The number of the bank account (MAX 255; MIN 3).

bank_id.description: Identifier of the bank selected for the transfer when the provider requires choosing one.

routing_number.description: The routing_number of the bank account (MAX 255; MIN 3).

code.description: The beneficiary's specific financial institution code (MAX 8).

branch.description: The beneficiary's specific financial institution branch (MAX 8).

branch_digit.description: The beneficiary's specific financial institution branch digit (MAX 2).

beneficiary_name.description: Name of the account holder (MAX 255; MIN 3).

third_party_token_id.description: Tokenized ID of the destination account (MAX 255; MIN 3).

account_holder_type.description: Bank account holder type (for ACH payments).

stored_credentials.description: Indicates the processing type of the transaction. Refer to the [stored credentials](doc:stored-credentials#create-a-payment-with-processing-type) documentation for more information.

reason.description: Indicates the processing type of the transaction.

usage.description: This field Iets you indicate if this is the first time the vaulted_token/network_token is used for a payment.

subscription_agreement_id.description: This field lets you indicate the identification of the agreement with the customer for a subscription (MAX 255; MIN 3). See [Stored credentials](doc:stored-credentials) for more info.

current.description: Current billing cycles for the subscription.

total.description: The total number of billing cycles for the subscription.

billing_cycles.description: Defines the number of charges associated to the subscription. If using this object, you must enter data on all fields.

type.description: Specifies the frequency type (e.g., DAY, WEEK, MONTH, YEAR).

frequency.description: Specifies the frequency type (e.g., DAY, WEEK, MONTH, YEAR) and value. Enter data on all fields if using this object.

start_at.description: The start date that the subscription plan will be available to use. If not set, the subscription is available from the moment it is created. `start_at` becomes mandatory when using `finish_at`.

finish_at.description: The end date until the subscription plan will be available to use. If not defined, the subscription does not have an expiration date. `finish_at` becomes mandatory when using `start_at`.

availability.description: Defines a date interval based on starting and ending dates when the subscription is available to use.

additional_data.description: This object is used to send additional information about recurrence.

strong_customer_authentication_exemption.description: Array of Strong Customer Authentication (SCA) exemptions that can be applied to the transaction to reduce friction while maintaining security compliance.

vault_on_success.description: Flag to enroll the card after a successful payment (requires `customer_payer.id`).

is_required.description: Specifies if a one time password is required in the flow

frequency.description: Specifies the frequency object (used when creating a payment along with the subscription).

execution.description: Indicates if the payment is made by Yuno or the merchant.

availability.description: Specifies the availability object (used when creating a payment along with the subscription).

start_at.description: Start date of the subscription in UTC time ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601), MAX 27; MIN 27).

finish_at.description: End date of the subscription in UTC time ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601), MAX 27; MIN 27).

amount.description: Specifies the amount object (used when creating a payment along with the subscription).

value.description: The amount of the subscription payment.

currency.description: The currency used to make the payment. For a full list of currency codes, see [Country reference](doc:country-reference) (MAX 3; MIN 3; ISO 4217).

id.description: Unique identifier of the subscription payment (used when creating a payment for an existing subscription).

billing_date.description: Specifies the billing date object (used when creating a payment for an existing subscription).

day.description: Day of the month when the subscription payment is made

callback_url.description: The URL where to redirect the customer after the payment. Only required for DIRECT integrations that have a redirection (MAX 526; MIN 3).

stand_alone.description: Optional field to send in the payment indicating if the fraud screening is stand alone, meaning that a payment will not be excecuted after the fraud screening is made. You can use this field while creating your CARD route.

recipient_id.description:
The unique identifier of the recipient in the Yuno system.
You must provide the [`recipient_id`](ref:create-recipient-1) (Yuno-generated) or the `provider_recipient_id` (external provider's ID) when creating a payment.

provider_recipient_id.description:
The recipient ID provided by the external payment provider, if applicable.
You must provide the `provider_recipient_id` or the [`recipient_id`](ref:create-recipients) (Yuno-generated) when creating a payment.

type.description: The type of split. `recipient_id` is mandatory for `PURCHASE` and `MARKETPLACE`.

merchant_reference.description: Optional unique identifier for the split transaction (MAX 255; MIN 3).

recipient_type.description: The type of recipient for the provider.

amount.description: Defines the amount of the split.

currency.description: The currency used to make the payment. For a full list of currency codes, see [Country reference](doc:country-reference) (MAX 3; MIN 3; ISO 4217).

liability.description: Optional information regarding the recipient's liability for fees and chargebacks.

processing_fee.description: Indicates who will be charged the transaction fee.

chargebacks.description: The recipient is responsible in case of a chargeback.

metadata.description: Custom key–value tags to track this payment or add context (e.g., order_id, invoice, campaign). Up to 120 items.

key.description: The metadata key (MAX 48. Value: MIN:1, MAX:48). **[Case Sensitive]**

value.description: The metadata key value (MAX 512. Value: MIN:1, MAX:512). **[Case Sensitive]**

post.description: Cancels a pending or authorized payment.

parameters.name: payment_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the payment to cancel

post.description: Creates a refund for a completed payment. Supports partial refunds.

parameters.name: payment_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the payment to refund

amount.description: Refund amount. Omit for full refund.

get.description: Returns all installment plans configured for the account.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the account. Find it on the [Yuno dashboard](https://dashboard.y.uno) (UUID; 36 chars).

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Currency used for filtering plans (ISO 4217; 3 chars).

parameters.name: iin
parameters.description: The issuer identification number (IIN) refers to the first few digits of a payment card number issued by a financial institution (MAX 8; MIN 6). In case you defined an iin for the installments plan, you can use it to filter the response. Alternative to card_number — send either iin or card_number, not both.

parameters.name: card_number
parameters.description: The full card number (PAN). Must be numeric and between 13–19 digits. When provided, it is securely tokenized and used for installment calculation. Alternative to iin — send either card_number or iin, not both.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount that the installment plan is available for. In case you defined an amount range for the installments plan, you can use it to filter the response.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: starting_after
parameters.description: Cursor for forward pagination. Pass the ID of the last item from the previous page.

parameters.name: ending_before
parameters.description: Cursor for backward pagination. Pass the ID of the first item from the previous page.

post.description: Creates a new installment plan for the account.

get.description: Retrieves a specific installment plan by ID.

parameters.name: installments_plan_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the installment plan

parameters.name: installments_plan_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the installment plan

parameters.name: installments_plan_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the installment plan

parameters.description: Cursor for forward pagination. Pass the ID of the last item from the previous page.

parameters.name: ending_before
parameters.description: Cursor for backward pagination. Pass the ID of the first item from the previous page.

parameters.name: customer_id

parameters.name: recipient_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the recipient

delete.description: Deletes an existing payout recipient. Active payouts associated with this recipient must be completed or cancelled first.

parameters.name: recipient_id

post.description: Automatically determines whether to cancel or refund a payment based on its current status. If the payment is authorized but not captured, it cancels. If captured, it refunds.

parameters.name: payment_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the payment

amount.description: Amount to refund. Omit for full cancellation/refund.

reason.description: Reason for the cancellation or refund

post.description: Notifies Yuno that the order associated with a payment has been fulfilled. This is used for fraud prevention and chargeback protection.

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the payment

patch.description: Updates an existing dispute with additional evidence or status changes.

parameters.name: payment_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the payment

parameters.name: dispute_id

post.description: Captures a previously authorized payment. You must provide both the payment ID and the transaction ID from the authorization response.

parameters.name: payment_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the payment

parameters.name: transaction_id
parameters.description: The transaction ID from the authorization response

amount.description: Optional partial capture amount. If omitted, captures the full authorized amount.

publicApiKey.name: public-api-key
publicApiKey.description: Your public API key from the Yuno Dashboard

accountCode.name: account-code
accountCode.description: Your account identifier. The alias X-Account-Code is also accepted.

value.description: Payment amount in major currency units (e.g., 150.00 means 150 BRL, not cents). For zero-decimal currencies like CLP and PYG, use whole numbers (e.g., 15000 means 15,000 CLP).

document_number.description: Document number (digits only). CPF: 11 digits, CNPJ: 14 digits.

account_id.description: Your Yuno account identifier. Same value as the account-code header.

payment_description.description: Description of the payment. Required for checkout session creation.

callback_url.description: URL to receive server-side payment notifications

return_url.description: URL to redirect the customer after payment completion (required for 3DS, PIX, and redirect-based methods)

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for storing additional information. Keys and values must be strings. Maximum 50 keys, each key max 40 characters, each value max 500 characters.

recurring_payment.description: Optional configuration for recurring payments and subscriptions

management_url.description: URL for the customer to manage the recurring payment

billing_agreement.description: Billing agreement for the recurring payment

interval_unit.description: The frequency unit for recurring charges

interval_count.description: The number of interval units between charges

payment_methods.description: Available payment methods for this session

callback_url.description: URL to receive server-side payment notifications

return_url.description: URL to redirect the customer after payment completion (required for 3DS, PIX, and redirect-based methods)

checkout_session.description: The checkout session ID from the create session response

token.description: Payment method token (for tokenized card payments)

vaulted_token.description: Vaulted payment method token (for returning customers)

merchant_order_id.description: Your unique order reference. If not provided, inherits from the checkout session.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for storing additional information. Keys and values must be strings. Maximum 50 keys, each key max 40 characters, each value max 500 characters.

transactions.description: Individual processing attempts for this payment

refunds.description: Refund records associated with this payment

three_ds.description: 3DS authentication details, present for card payments

redirect_url.description: URL to redirect the customer for 3DS challenge

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs set by the merchant

failure_reason.description: Decline details when status is DECLINED or REJECTED

provider_code.description: Raw decline code from the payment provider

customer_id.description: ID of the associated customer record

installments.description: Installment details if payment was split into installments

plan_id.description: Installment plan ID if using merchant installments

account_id.description: Account IDs this plan applies to

installments_plan.description: Array of installment options with rates

first_installment_deferral.description: Number of periods before first installment

recipient_id.description: The recipient to send funds to

purpose.description: Purpose of the payout (see Purposes reference list)

from.description: Start date in ISO 8601 datetime format

to.description: End date in ISO 8601 datetime format

date_range.description: Date range for the report. Must use datetime format (yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'), not date-only format.

download_url.description: URL to download the completed report

message.example: The request body contains invalid or missing fields

field.description: JSON path of the invalid field

provider_error.description: Raw error from the payment provider, when available

error.message: The request body contains invalid or missing fields

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event occurred

webhook_id.description: Unique identifier for this webhook delivery (use for deduplication)

status.description: The payment status that triggered this event

provider_name.description: The provider that processed the payment

refund_amount.description: Refund amount (only present for refund events)

refund_reason.description: Reason for refund (only present for refund events)

decline_reason.description: Reason for decline (only present for payment.failed events)

customer_id.description: The customer to create a session for

vaulted_token.description: Token for reuse in future payments

secret.description: Shared secret for HMAC signature verification
